title: Jujutsu Kaisen (Sorcery Fight)
description: Jujutsu Kaisen (Sorcery Fight) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to become a Sorcerer and fight curses!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight/BH_Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight_header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight/BH_Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight_promo2.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Overview Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight/BH_Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight_overview.webp)
---
**Jujutsu Kaisen (Sorcery Fight)** is a gameplay focused modpack based on Jujutsu Kaisen. Enjoy a world filled with a variety of sorcerers, monsters, curses and more, play as your favourite people from Jujutsu Kaisen or go down the demonic path. This modpack is designed to balance both gameplay and performance while preserving the theme of Jujutsu Kaisen, enjoy a host of other mods that will compliment your travels.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/jujutsu-kaisen-sorcery-fight)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jujutsu-kaisen-sorcery-fight)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/3SauFGHWgOg?si=rqEWhIel1iuhzDoE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Banner Features](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight/BH_Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight_features.webp)
---
- [✔️] **JujutsuCraft** - Sorcerers, monsters and curses all want to kill you, don't make the mistake of thinking there all friendly.
- [✔️] **Time To Explore** - This world holds a lot of mystery, run down structures and cities filled with curses and cursed objects.
- [✔️] **Digging Your Own Grave** - Planning on dying, don't worry we've got you covered, when you drop so does your body keeping your loot safe.
- [✔️] **It's Time To ParCool** - Enjoy a variety of fresh animations, diving off a cliff? Do it in style, or perhaps you need to crawl somewhere.

[![Banner Discord](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight/BH_Jujutsu_Kaisen_Sorcery_Fight_discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
